# Audible PDF Renamer

> Local CLI for renaming Audible PDF companion files to extracted book titles.

Audible PDF Renamer is a Python command-line tool that extracts titles from
Audible audiobook companion PDFs and renames local files. It parses PDFs and
OCR output as untrusted local input and applies conservative filename,
terminal-output, and resource-limit safeguards.

## Key files

- [README](https://github.com/snapsynapse/audible-pdf-renamer/blob/main/README.md): user installation, usage, security, and troubleshooting notes.
- [Assistant Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/snapsynapse/audible-pdf-renamer/main/.well-known/assistant-guide.txt): bounded assistant instructions for local development and release review.
- [Source](https://github.com/snapsynapse/audible-pdf-renamer/blob/main/audible_pdf_renamer.py): CLI implementation.
- [Tests](https://github.com/snapsynapse/audible-pdf-renamer/tree/main/tests): regression and hardening evals.
- [Changelog](https://github.com/snapsynapse/audible-pdf-renamer/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history.

## Safety notes

- Do not upload copyrighted or private PDFs to public issues.
- Avoid posting sensitive full verbose output when it includes book titles or PDF metadata.
- Use `--dry-run --verbose` before renaming a new batch.
- GuideCheck conformance is form evidence, not a safety guarantee.
